name: Force of Nature

passives.name: Steadfast
passives.effects: Taking {{as|magic damage}} from champions generates a stack of ''Steadfast'' for 7 seconds, stacking up to 8 times with the duration refreshing on subsequent {{as|magic damage}} from them and whenever dealing damage to them. Becoming {{tip|immobilize|immobilized}} by an enemy champion generates 2 stacks and also refreshes the duration. Once per {{tip|cast instance}}, each incoming basic attack, ability, or item effect can only generate 1 stack of ''Steadfast'' from their damage every 1 second. At '''maximum''' stacks, gain {{as|70 '''bonus''' magic resistance}} and {{as|6% '''bonus''' movement speed}}.

effects_structured.raw: Taking {{as magic damage}} from champions generates a stack of ''Steadfast'' for 7 seconds, stacking up to 8 times with the duration refreshing on subsequent {{as magic damage}} from them and whenever dealing damage to them
Becoming {{tip immobilize immobilized}} by an enemy champion generates 2 stacks and also refreshes the duration
Once per {{tip cast instance}}, each incoming basic attack, ability, or item effect can only generate 1 stack of ''Steadfast'' from their damage every 1 second
At '''maximum''' stacks, gain {{as 70 '''bonus''' magic resistance}} and {{as 6% '''bonus''' movement speed}}.

simpleDescription: Move Speed, Magic Resist, and max Health Regeneration

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Force of Nature is modeled as anti-magic sustained-combat ramp defense: incoming magic pressure and immobilize windows build Steadfast stacks that unlock a max-stack resist and movement-speed spike.
